memoryArtifacts.headline: Blanche de Bretagne (1270-1327)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Blanche de Bretagne (1270 - 19 mars 1327) est une princesse bretonne, fille de Jean II, duc de Bretagne et de Béatrice d'Angleterre.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne於1270年1月1日出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，她的父親John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne30歲，母親Béatrice of England27歲。她於1281年11月與Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront在法國阿托斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年3月19日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內享年57歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne于1270年1月1日出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，她的父亲John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne30岁，母亲Béatrice of England27岁。她于1281年11月与Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront在法国阿托斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年3月19日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內享年57岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, now used as a given name throughout the English-speaking world. In the 20th century it was particularly popular in Australia. The surname was originally a Norman baronial name, but a precise identification of the place from which it was derived has not been made (there are a large number of possible candidates). The Bruces were an influential Norman family in Scottish affairs in the early Middle Ages; its most famous member was  Robert  ‘the Bruce’ (  1274–1329 ), who is said to have drawn inspiration after his defeat at Methven from the perseverance of a spider in repeatedly climbing up again after being knocked down. He ruled Scotland as  King Robert I  from  1306 to 1329 .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne was born on 1 January 1270, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, was 30 and her mother, Béatrice of England, was 27. She married Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront in November 1281, in Artois, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 19 March 1327, in Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne est née le 1 janvier 1270, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Béatrice of England, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront en novembre 1281, à Artois, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mars 1327, à Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne am 1. Januar 1270 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne 30 und ihre Mutter Béatrice of England 27. Sie hat im November 1281 in Artois, Frankreich Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. März 1327 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne è nata il il 1 gennaio 1270 nel Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Béatrice of England, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront nel novembre 1281, nel Artois, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 marzo 1327, nel Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche Dreux Of Bretagneが1270年1月1日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで生まれた時，父John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagneは30歳，母Béatrice of Englandは27歳であった。1281年11月にフランスアルトイスでPhilip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfrontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年3月19日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンで57歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne(이)가 1270년 1월 1일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice of England(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1281년 11월 프랑스 아토이스에서 Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 3월 19일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

mn.1 JAN 1270–19 MAR 1327: 1270 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1327 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 19

pt.1 JAN 1270–19 MAR 1327: 1 de janeiro de 1270–19 de março de 1327
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1270, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice of England, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront em novembro de 1281, em Artois, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de março de 1327, em Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne родилась 1 января 1270 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice of England, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront ноябрь 1281 г. в местности артоис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 19 марта 1327 г. в местности вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.1 JAN 1270–19 MAR 1327: 1 de enero de 1270–19 de marzo de 1327
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne nació el 1 de enero de 1270, en Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Béatrice of England, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront en noviembre de 1281, en Artois, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1327, en Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
